nodes.name: expert.md
nodes.summary: Expert persona prompt for Archon defining core traits, communication style, verbosity rules, code example standards, response patterns for decisions/analysis/architecture, knowledge sharing approach, quality gates, and example response structure for deep technical expertise mode.

nodes.name: quick.md
nodes.summary: Quick persona prompt for Archon defining the fast, minimal-output mode with core traits, minimal verbosity rules, speed optimization shortcuts, formatting patterns (minimal headers, lists, inline code), and guidance on when NOT to use the quick persona.

nodes.name: teacher.md
nodes.summary: Teacher persona prompt for Archon defining pedagogical communication style with concept introduction patterns, step-by-step problem solving, debugging-as-learning approach, jargon busting, analogies, progressive disclosure, encouraging language, and interactive teaching elements.
